user.title: Set up Proxon FWT
user.description: Enter connection details for the Proxon RS485-to-LAN adapter. Room names will be read from the device automatically after the connection test.

data_description.host: IP address of the USR RS485-LAN adapter (e.g. 10.42.20.2)
data_description.port: TCP port of the adapter – default 502, only change if configured differently
data_description.slave: Modbus device ID of the Proxon FWT – default 41, configurable on the device
data_description.scan_interval: How often all registers are read from the device (10–300 s). Shorter intervals increase RS485 bus load.
data_description.filter_notification: Show a notification in Home Assistant when the device filter needs to be replaced

reconfigure.title: Proxon FWT – Reconfigure Connection
reconfigure.description: Change connection parameters and re-discover rooms from the device.

data_description.host: IP address of the USR RS485-LAN adapter
data_description.port: TCP port of the adapter – default 502
data_description.slave: Modbus device ID of the Proxon FWT – default 41

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – check IP address, port and slave ID

data_description.filter_notification: Show a persistent notification in HA when the device filter needs to be replaced. Dismissed automatically after the filter has been acknowledged.
data_description.scan_interval: How often all registers are read from the device (10–300 s). Takes effect immediately after saving.
